title: Lily's Garden Friends
synopsis: Lily discovers the joy of making friends with both children and nature in her neighborhood garden, learning that friendship can bloom in the most wonderful ways.

pages.text: Lily loves to explore. Today she finds a beautiful garden with colorful flowers and buzzing bees. The sun shines bright on the pretty plants.

illustration.description: A little girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes stands at the entrance of a sunny community garden filled with bright flowers, butterflies, and bees, with diverse children visible in the background playing near garden beds
illustration.alt: Lily discovering a colorful community garden

pages.text: "What a wonderful place!" says Lily. She sees red roses, yellow sunflowers, and purple violets. A friendly butterfly lands on her hand.

illustration.description: Close-up of a girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes gently holding her hand out with a colorful butterfly perched on it, surrounded by vibrant flowers in primary colors with white space around the edges
illustration.alt: Lily with a butterfly on her hand among flowers

pages.text: In the garden, Lily meets Sam and Maya. They are planting seeds together. "Can I help?" asks Lily with a big smile.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes kneeling beside two diverse children in a bright sunny garden, all holding small shovels and seed packets, with playground equipment visible in the background
illustration.alt: Lily meeting Sam and Maya while gardening

pages.text: "Yes!" say her new friends. They dig little holes and plant tiny seeds. Lily waters them gently. The friends laugh and work together happily.

illustration.description: Three children including a girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes working together in a garden, using bright colored watering cans and tools, with joyful expressions and white space creating an energetic, inclusive scene
illustration.alt: The three friends planting seeds together

pages.text: Lily learns that friends are everywhere in the garden. The bees help flowers grow. The worms help the soil. Even the ladybugs are helpful friends!

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting cross-legged in a bright garden surrounded by friendly insects including bees, ladybugs, and butterflies, with diverse children playing on swings and slides in the background
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by helpful garden creatures

pages.text: "I love this garden," says Lily. "I made friends with Sam, Maya, and all the garden creatures too!" She hugs her new friends goodbye and promises to come back tomorrow.

illustration.description: A group hug scene with a girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes embracing two diverse children in a sunny garden setting with primary colored flowers, white space, and playground equipment creating a joyful, energetic friendship scene
illustration.alt: Lily hugging her new friends in the garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: What does Lily find at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Lily discovers a beautiful garden with colorful flowers and buzzing bees.

questions.question: Who are Lily's new friends?
questions.explanation: Lily meets Sam and Maya in the garden, and they become friends while planting seeds together.

questions.question: What lands on Lily's hand?
questions.explanation: A friendly butterfly lands on Lily's hand when she's exploring the flowers.

questions.question: What do the children do together in the garden?
questions.explanation: Lily, Sam, and Maya work together planting seeds and watering them in the garden.
